scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build:app -w apps/daemon && npm run build:app -w apps/web-shell
scripts.check: npm run check:docs-current-truth && npm run build:packages && npm run check:app -w apps/daemon && npm run check:app -w apps/web-shell
scripts.format:check: oxfmt --check AGENTS.md .oxfmtrc.json .prettierrc.json eslint.config.js package.json .rustlike/provider.mjs apps/daemon/src apps/web-shell/src apps/web-shell/index.html packages/agent-loop/src packages/protocol/src packages/shared-utils/src packages/tool-library/src scripts/*.mjs && prettier --check package-lock.json
scripts.lint:web-shell: npm run lint:web-shell:source && npm run lint:web-shell:tests
scripts.test:scripts: node --test --test-skip-pattern="LIVE_ONLY:" scripts/build-ptc-session-image.test.mjs scripts/check-npm-installable-distribution.test.mjs scripts/collect-public-ci-mirror-evidence.test.mjs scripts/export-public-ci-mirror.test.mjs scripts/local-dev-auth-token.test.mjs scripts/npm-installable-distribution-validation.test.mjs scripts/npm-package-manifest.test.mjs scripts/owned-child-process.test.mjs scripts/prepare-public-ci-mirror.test.mjs scripts/provider-auth-release-validation.test.mjs scripts/run-eslint-shards.test.mjs scripts/run-node-tests-fail-fast.test.mjs scripts/run-workspace-node-tests.test.mjs
scripts.test:packages: npm test -w packages/shared-utils && npm test -w packages/protocol && npm test -w packages/agent-loop && npm test -w packages/tool-library
scripts.test: npm run build:packages && npm run test:packages && npm run test:app -w apps/daemon && npm run test:app -w apps/web-shell
scripts.ouro:monitor:slt: uv run ouroboros tui monitor --backend slt
